response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the 'Steppin' out' lyrics in the Reference JSON. For '[A]ddiction', the Reference JSON provided lyrics for a different verse; I have ignored the incorrect JSON and relied on the clear on-screen text and audio transcription. All timestamps are strictly tied to the vocal audio waveform, with discrete blocks created for each vocal burst and semantic phrase.
